description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that sets the CARGO_HOME variable to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/cargo and defines a cache containing the target/ and cargo/ directories. Add a before_script that runs rustc --version and cargo --version for all jobs. Define three jobs—test:beta, test:nightly, and test:stable—each using the scorpil/rust Docker image with the corresponding tag (beta, nightly, stable), inheriting the shared cache and executing the script cargo test --verbose --jobs 1 --release, and all run in the default test stage.
